name: Sage and Herb Whole Wheat Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Spray a 2-quart casserole dish with cooking spray and set aside.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine bread crumbs (from 8 slices of bread) and bread cubes (from 4 slices).
4. Add chopped onions, celery, sage, marjoram, black pepper, and whipped egg whites to the bread mixture.
5. Slowly add chicken broth while continuing to toss until well combined.
6. Spoon the stuffing into the prepared casserole dish.
7. Bake for 45 minutes.
Per serving: 115 Calories; 2g Fat (14% of calories from fat); 5g Protein; 20g Carbohydrate; 0mg Cholesterol; 375mg Sodium
